crime.value: Attempted theft of the Hope Diamond and murder of the grandmother who protected it
crime.quote: Nana got in my way, so she had to be disposed of.

victim.value: Nana (grandmother) who was the guardian of the Hope Diamond and had to be eliminated to access it
victim.quote: You must guard the Diamond with your life, just like I always have.

closed_world.value: The Smithsonian Museum at night where the Hope Diamond is displayed
closed_world.quote: Quickly, Hanna ran through the dark hallways of the Smithsonian.

culprit_and_motive.value: Hanna's mother, motivated by greed to steal the valuable Hope Diamond
culprit_and_motive.quote: Hello, Hanna. Replied Hanna's mother, lifting up her mask so that Hanna could see her face.

resolution.value: Hanna physically defeats her mother with a pipe and calls police to arrest the criminal
resolution.quote: I have a criminal here for you; she tried to steal the Hope Diamond.

investigator.value: Hanna Brennan, the granddaughter who receives a mysterious note and must solve the truth about her grandmother's death
investigator.quote: I need your help. You must stop them from getting the Diamond.

suspect_architecture.value: Single revealed suspect (mother) with clear motive (greed for Hope Diamond) and opportunity (museum access), but minimal differentiation or suspect pool
suspect_architecture.quote: Hello, Hanna.' Replied Hanna's mother, lifting up her mask so that Hanna could see her face.

red_herring.value: Historical curse of the Hope Diamond presented as supernatural explanation before human conspiracy is revealed
red_herring.quote: Most people thought it was the curse of an Indian Goddess causing the strange occurences to happen.

clue_fairness.value: Key clue 'Hope is a very mysterious thing' sign shown to reader when Hanna discovers it, allowing deduction of diamond identity
clue_fairness.quote: Hope is a very mysterious thing.' 'What is that supposed to mean?' Hanna asked herself.

social_world.value: Multi-generational criminal organization targeting wealthy diamond owners across centuries, with family inheritance of guardianship role
social_world.quote: Only a group of horrible and malicious criminals would do something like that.

alibi.value: Mother's absence during museum tour creates false impression of separation while positioning her for theft attempt
alibi.quote: Hanna looked over for her mother, but found she was not in sight.

reveal_mechanic.value: Physical confrontation and confession during attempted theft, with mother removing mask to reveal identity
reveal_mechanic.quote: She was amazed when she saw who it was. Then she put the impossible into words. 'Mother?'

media_and_audience.value: Final scene shows reporters and photographers swarming for the story, with Hanna repeating the cryptic phrase to media
media_and_audience.quote: Reporters and Photographers were closing in on all sides, trying to catch a glimpse of the Brennan family.

investigator_wound.value: Hanna's grief over grandmother's death and inherited responsibility to protect the diamond with her life
investigator_wound.quote: I promised Nana that I would protect the Diamond with my life. And I'm not planning on breaking that promise

_meta.title: ebook robi crusoe hope is a very mysterious thing
